demo-tab-webhooks.patch:
diff --git a/src/webhooks/deliveryWorker.ts b/src/webhooks/deliveryWorker.ts
index c932bd1..8ce0b0f 100644
--- a/src/webhooks/deliveryWorker.ts
+++ b/src/webhooks/deliveryWorker.ts
@@ -5,17 +5,13 @@ import { backoff } from './retryPolicy'
-const attempts = new Map<string, number>()
-
 export async function deliver(job: DeliveryJob) {
-  const attempt = (attempts.get(job.endpointId) ?? 0) + 1
-  attempts.set(job.endpointId, attempt)
   const response = await fetch(job.url, requestFor(job))
   if (response.ok) {
     await queue.acknowledge(job.id)
-    attempts.delete(job.endpointId)
     return
   }
-  await queue.retry(job, backoff(attempt))
+  await queue.retry(job, backoff(job.attempt + 1))
 }
diff --git a/src/queue/webhookQueue.ts b/src/queue/webhookQueue.ts
index 3f4821a..62a77e4 100644
--- a/src/queue/webhookQueue.ts
+++ b/src/queue/webhookQueue.ts
@@ -18,8 +18,12 @@ export interface DeliveryJob {
-export async function retry(job: DeliveryJob, delayMs: number) {
+export async function retry(
+  job: DeliveryJob,
+  delayMs: number,
+  now: () => number = Date.now,
+) {
   await redis.zadd(
     RETRY_KEY,
-    Date.now() + delayMs,
+    now() + delayMs,
     JSON.stringify({ ...job, attempt: job.attempt + 1 }),
   )
 }
diff --git a/src/webhooks/deliveryWorker.test.ts b/src/webhooks/deliveryWorker.test.ts
index 593d221..eb51a06 100644
--- a/src/webhooks/deliveryWorker.test.ts
+++ b/src/webhooks/deliveryWorker.test.ts
@@ -76,6 +76,31 @@ test('acknowledges a successful delivery once', async () => {
   expect(queue.retry).not.toHaveBeenCalled()
 })
+
+test('keeps attempts isolated across interleaved deliveries', async () => {
+  const first = deliveryJob({ id: 'job-a', endpointId: 'endpoint-1', attempt: 0 })
+  const second = deliveryJob({ id: 'job-b', endpointId: 'endpoint-1', attempt: 3 })
+  fetchMock.mockResolvedValue(response(503))
+
+  await Promise.all([deliver(first), deliver(second)])
+
+  expect(queue.retry).toHaveBeenCalledWith(first, 1000)
+  expect(queue.retry).toHaveBeenCalledWith(second, 8000)
+})
+
+test('schedules retries against the injected clock', async () => {
+  const now = () => Date.parse('2026-07-14T16:00:00.000Z')
+  await queue.retry(deliveryJob({ attempt: 1 }), 2000, now)
+  expect(redis.zadd).toHaveBeenCalledWith(
+    'webhook:retries',
+    Date.parse('2026-07-14T16:00:02.000Z'),
+    expect.any(String),
+  )
+})

turnSnapshots.userMessagePreview: Fix the flaky retry logic in webhook delivery

demo-tab-ratelimit.patch:
diff --git a/src/ratelimit/tokenBucket.ts b/src/ratelimit/tokenBucket.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..72bc1f0
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/ratelimit/tokenBucket.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,28 @@
+import type { Redis } from '../infra/redis'
+
+const TOKEN_BUCKET_SCRIPT = `
+local tokens = tonumber(redis.call('HGET', KEYS[1], 'tokens')) or tonumber(ARGV[1])
+local updated_at = tonumber(redis.call('HGET', KEYS[1], 'updated_at')) or tonumber(ARGV[3])
+local elapsed = math.max(0, tonumber(ARGV[3]) - updated_at)
+tokens = math.min(tonumber(ARGV[1]), tokens + elapsed * tonumber(ARGV[2]) / 1000)
+local allowed = tokens >= 1
+if allowed then tokens = tokens - 1 end
+redis.call('HSET', KEYS[1], 'tokens', tokens, 'updated_at', ARGV[3])
+return { allowed and 1 or 0, math.floor(tokens) }
+`
+
+export async function consumeTokenBucket(redis: Redis, key: string, capacity: number, refill: number, nowMs: number) {
+  const [allowed, remaining] = await redis.eval(TOKEN_BUCKET_SCRIPT, [key], [capacity, refill, nowMs])
+  return { allowed: allowed === 1, limit: capacity, remaining }
+}
diff --git a/src/middleware/rateLimit.ts b/src/middleware/rateLimit.ts
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..bc912be
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/middleware/rateLimit.ts
@@ -0,0 +1,22 @@
+import { consumeTokenBucket } from '../ratelimit/tokenBucket'
+
+export function rateLimit(deps: RateLimitDeps): Middleware {
+  return async (request, next) => {
+    const apiKeyId = request.context.apiKey.id
+    const decision = await consumeTokenBucket(deps.redis, `ratelimit:${apiKeyId}`, deps.capacity, deps.refill, deps.now())
+    request.response.headers.set('RateLimit-Limit', String(decision.limit))
+    request.response.headers.set('RateLimit-Remaining', String(decision.remaining))
+    if (!decision.allowed) return request.json({ error: { code: 'rate_limit_exceeded', requestId: request.id } }, 429)
+    return next()
+  }
+}
diff --git a/src/api/router.ts b/src/api/router.ts
index 90a3bf2..1ab214a 100644
--- a/src/api/router.ts
+++ b/src/api/router.ts
@@ -1,5 +1,6 @@
 import { authenticateApiKey } from '../auth/apiKey'
+import { rateLimit } from '../middleware/rateLimit'
@@ -12,6 +13,7 @@ export function createApiRouter(deps: ApiDeps) {
   api.use('/v1/*', authenticateApiKey(deps.apiKeys))
+  api.use('/v1/*', rateLimit(deps.rateLimit))
   api.route('/v1/links', linkRoutes(deps))

turnSnapshots.userMessagePreview: Add per-key rate limiting to the public API
